title: Temporarily Hide Premium Features for Beta Users
story: As a DataTools Pro user on the beta plan, I want to only see features available to me, so that I am not confused by premium features I cannot access.
description:
Temporarily hide premium features from the UI using `display:none` for beta users. The hidden features include:

- **Branding** — custom branding options
- **Notion** — Notion integration
- **Tableau** — Tableau integration
- **Reports and Dashboards** — reporting features

This is a quick UI-level hide rather than a full feature-gating implementation, intended to simplify the beta experience.
acceptance_criteria: Branding section is hidden from the UI
Notion integration is hidden from the UI
Tableau integration is hidden from the UI
Reports and Dashboards section is hidden from the UI
ux_changes: Branding, Notion integration, Tableau integration, and Reports and Dashboards sections are hidden via CSS display:none for beta users.
implementation_notes: Quick CSS-level hide using display:none. Not a full feature-gate implementation — these features will be re-enabled when premium plans are available.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the features were hidden.
